title: SpawnModule
description: Per-frame particle spawner. Subclasses decide how many particles to emit each tick (rate-based, burst, on-demand) and write their initial values directly into the system's typed-array slots. Implementation pattern: ```ts apply(system, dt) { const count = this.computeSpawnCount(dt); for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { const slot = system.spawn(); if (slot < 0) break; // capacity exhausted system.posX[slot] = ...; system.velX[slot] = ...; system.lifetime[slot] = ...; // ...etc } } ``` Spawn modules run before integration each frame. Multiple modules can be registered on one system and execute in registration order.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Per-frame particle spawner. Subclasses decide how many particles to emit each tick (rate-based, burst, on-demand) and write their initial values directly into the system's typed-array slots.

```ts apply(system, dt) { const count = this.computeSpawnCount(dt); for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { const slot = system.spawn(); if (slot < 0) break; // capacity exhausted system.posX[slot] = ...; system.velX[slot] = ...; system.lifetime[slot] = ...; // ...etc } } ```
Spawn modules run before integration each frame. Multiple modules can be registered on one system and execute in registration order.
